title: Opening Lines
story: Some inscriptions need a fresh line. o opens one below, O opens one above — both drop you straight into insert stance.

challenges.intro: A second verse belongs below. Open a new line and write 'dark'.
challenges.hint: o opens a new line below and enters insert stance.

challenges.intro: A title belongs above. Open a line over the text and write 'first'.
challenges.hint: O opens a new line above the current one.
